title: enchylaena tomentosa
intro: Enchylaena tomentosa, also known as the rabbit-proof fence or bush tomato, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myoporaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions, wounds, and inflammation due to its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Enchylaena tomentosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote healing. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves, stems, and berries, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications.
